# climate_isle - Isle of Many Climates: per-region climate= TEST island.
# Regenerate: python tools/gen_climate_isle.py > shapes/climate_isle.txt
# Suggested: /genisland shape=climate_isle diameter=500 height=12
#
# 8 identical strips, west to east: frozen (-20:0.9), cold, temperate,
# CONTROL (no climate key, natural tint), lush, dry, arid, scorched (40:0.0).
# Terrain and flora are the same everywhere; only the tint should change.

region 1 rock=granite fertility=medium surface=grass forest=0.020 trees=englishoak,silverbirch height=0.5 shore=12 rough=0.06 climate=-20:0.9
region 2 rock=granite fertility=medium surface=grass forest=0.020 trees=englishoak,silverbirch height=0.5 shore=12 rough=0.06 climate=cold
region 3 rock=granite fertility=medium surface=grass forest=0.020 trees=englishoak,silverbirch height=0.5 shore=12 rough=0.06 climate=temperate
# strip 4 is the CONTROL: no climate key, natural tint.
region 4 rock=granite fertility=medium surface=grass forest=0.020 trees=englishoak,silverbirch height=0.5 shore=12 rough=0.06
region 5 rock=granite fertility=medium surface=grass forest=0.020 trees=englishoak,silverbirch height=0.5 shore=12 rough=0.06 climate=lush
region 6 rock=granite fertility=medium surface=grass forest=0.020 trees=englishoak,silverbirch height=0.5 shore=12 rough=0.06 climate=dry
region 7 rock=granite fertility=medium surface=grass forest=0.020 trees=englishoak,silverbirch height=0.5 shore=12 rough=0.06 climate=arid
region 8 rock=granite fertility=medium surface=grass forest=0.020 trees=englishoak,silverbirch height=0.5 shore=12 rough=0.06 climate=40:0.0
